title: Bitwise Launches US-Listed Hyperliquid Fund with Staking Rewards
summary: Bitwise has introduced a new fund, BHYP, offering spot exposure to Hyperliquid’s HYPE token. The fund will stake a portion of its holdings, providing staking rewards to investors.
body:
Bitwise Asset Management has launched a new US-listed fund, BHYP, which provides investors with spot exposure to Hyperliquid’s HYPE token. This fund is designed to offer a straightforward way for investors to gain exposure to the HYPE token without the complexities of direct ownership or staking.

One of the key features of the BHYP fund is that it will stake a portion of its HYPE token holdings through Bitwise’s in-house staking division. This means that investors in the fund will benefit from staking rewards, which are typically earned by holding and staking cryptocurrencies to support network operations.

For everyday investors, this fund offers a simplified way to participate in the crypto market. It eliminates the need for technical knowledge about staking or the management of private keys. By investing in BHYP, users can gain exposure to the potential growth of the HYPE token while also earning staking rewards.

Investors interested in this opportunity should watch for the fund’s performance and any updates from Bitwise regarding staking rewards and fees. This could be a significant development for those looking to diversify their crypto holdings with minimal hassle.
twitterThread: Bitwise just launched a US-listed fund (BHYP) that offers spot exposure to Hyperliquid’s HYPE token AND staking rewards. No need to manage your own staking.
The fund will stake a portion of its HYPE holdings through Bitwise’s in-house staking division. Investors get the benefits of staking without the hassle.

If you’re looking for a simple way to gain exposure to HYPE and earn staking rewards, this could be a good option. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-15-bitwise-launches-us-listed-hyperliquid-fund-with-staking-rewards
standaloneTweet: Bitwise’s new BHYP fund lets you invest in Hyperliquid’s HYPE token and earn staking rewards without the technical hassle. Simple, smart crypto investing.
